---
name: ♻️ Code Refactor / Tech Debt
about: Propose a code refactoring or technical debt cleanup
title: '[REFACTOR] '
labels: ['refactor', 'maintenance']
assignees: ''
---

## 🧐 Description of the Issue
<!-- Describe the area of code that needs improvement. Why is it problematic? (e.g., hard to understand, performance issues, duplication) -->

## 🎯 Goal
<!-- What is the desired outcome of this refactoring? -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Changes
<!-- Describe the changes you intend to make. -->
- [ ] Change X to Y
- [ ] Extract method Z
- [ ] Update dependency W

## ⚠️ Risks & Impact
<!-- What could potentially break? What areas of the application does this touch? -->

## 🧪 Testing Strategy
<!-- How will you verify that the refactoring didn't break anything? -->

## ℹ️ Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context here. -->
